title: Feature flags management with localStorage persistence
purpose: Manages feature flag state using localStorage for persistence and React hooks for synchronization across components.
module_context: Exports a FeatureFlags interface, default flags, storage key constants, and utility functions for reading, writing, and syncing feature flags.

steps.content: Check if the value equals '1'.
IF the value equals '1', return true.
ELSE check if the value equals 'true'.
IF the value equals 'true', return true.
ELSE return false.
IF the window object is undefined, return the default flags.
ELSE attempt to read the feature flag from localStorage.
IF reading from localStorage succeeds, parse and return the flags.
IF reading from localStorage fails, return the default flags.
IF the window object is undefined, return immediately.
ELSE attempt to set or remove the feature flag in localStorage.
IF enabled is true, store '1' in localStorage.
ELSE remove the key from localStorage.
Dispatch a custom change event to notify other parts of the application.
IF storing fails, ignore the error silently.
Initialize the state with flags read from storage.
Setup effect to synchronize flags with storage changes.
IF the window object is undefined, return early.
ELSE register event listeners for storage and custom change events.
WHEN the component unmounts, remove the registered event listeners.
Return the current flags state.
